description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in traditional South Asian attire, featuring a long tunic (kurta) that extends to the knees and straight trousers underneath. Over the tunic, he wears a sleeveless vest that adds a formal touch to the outfit. The figure's arms are extended horizontally, and the hands and feet are visible, with the feet clad in open-toed sandals. The head is topped with an unusually elongated vertical structure, possibly representing stylized hair or a headpiece. The overall build is robust, with a slightly rounded torso and relaxed posture. The clothing appears simple and unadorned, emphasizing the traditional and everyday nature of the attire.
description: An adult male in traditional South Asian attire with a long tunic, vest, and sandals, featuring an elongated vertical headpiece and a robust build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tunic, vest, extended arms, and the elongated headpiece.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the tunic, vest, and the vertical extension of the headpiece.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vest, tunic, and the straight fall of the trousers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the figure, similar to the left but mirrored.
attribute_clothing_type: traditional long tunic with straight trousers and a sleeveless vest
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
